title: Compliance and Enforcement RSS Feeds - Canada.ca
content:
## Compliance and Enforcement RSS Feeds
Subscribe to the Really Simple Syndication (RSS) feeds below to obtain links to new and updated information when it is posted online.
Compliance and Enforcement RSS Feed Stay informed when new items, such as guidance documents, policies and forms, are added to the Compliance and Enforcement section of the website.
Healthy Canadians - Recalls and Safety Alerts - Health Canada - Medical Device and Drug Recalls Stay informed when new items, such as recalls of drugs and medical devices, are added to the Recalls & safety alerts posted on the Healthy Canadians website.
To view one of the RSS feeds online in your RSS Reader/Aggregator :
- Copy the Universal Resource Locator (URL) link(s) located beside the topic(s) of your choice.
- Paste the URL link(s) into your reader.
To receive email notices through an email RSS service :
- Copy the URL link(s) located beside the topic(s) of your choice.
- Paste the URL link(s) into the email subscription page.

## Additional Information
- More Health Canada RSS Feeds
- Further information or help about RSS?
